name: Fielder's ChoiceVR Baseball and Softball Fielding Training

reviews.review_title: Few small changed would get 4+ stars
reviews.review_description: Glove must be bigger than pulling trigger for a catch is absurd. If ball goes in glove that’s it.  The buzz noise for missing is so annoying.   U should be able to kick off like 10 balls in a row, not have to click for every ball.   The random should put valls to left, center, and or right.  The workout option I don’t even see how to get that to start.  Sadly I’ll have to refund this but I’d pay double asking price if these changes were made
Cool app.  I can get fielding reps at every position besides catcher!
Amazing game helps me work on in field and out field
